summary: Iteration 61: Security & Design System Testing Complete. All critical security features PASSED: Cross-tenant data isolation (Admin 1 sees 140 groups, Admin 2 sees 0), Platform admin isolation (sees 0 groups/locations), Rate limiting (5 attempts then 429). UI testing verified: Login page, Dashboard, People, Groups, Services, Giving pages all load correctly. Mobile bottom navigation with 5 tabs (Home, People, Services, Groups, Giving) working at viewport < 900px. Design system CSS custom properties properly defined (--radius-md: 8px, --radius-lg: 12px).

issues: Rate limit error toast appears correctly when limits exceeded - this is expected behavior

cross_tenant_isolation.details: Church Admin 1 (abundant-east-001) sees 140 groups, Church Admin 2 (cristoviene-church-001) sees 0 groups - no data leakage

platform_admin_isolation.details: Platform Admin (admin@solomonai.us) sees 0 groups and 0 check-in locations - no tenant data exposed

rate_limiting.details: IP rate limit: 5 requests per 60 seconds. Requests 1-5 return 401, requests 6+ return 429. Email rate limit: 10 per hour also working.

ui_tests.login_page: PASSED - Email/password fields, Sign In button, Google OAuth, Start Free Trial link
ui_tests.dashboard: PASSED - Greeting, stat cards, charts, sidebar navigation, Ask Solomon AI chat
ui_tests.people_page: PASSED - Members table with search, filters, Import CSV, Add Person buttons
ui_tests.groups_page: PASSED - 140 groups displayed in cards, search, Create Group button
ui_tests.services_page: PASSED - Service plans list with dates, items, status badges
ui_tests.giving_page: PASSED - Page loads (data loading skeleton visible)
ui_tests.mobile_bottom_nav: PASSED - 5 tabs visible at 375px viewport: Home, People, Services, Groups, Giving

critical_code_review_comments: Cross-tenant isolation properly enforced via tenant_id in get_current_admin_user()
Rate limiting implemented with check_rate_limit_v2() - 5 per IP per 60s, 10 per email per hour
Platform admin correctly returns empty data when no tenant context
Design system CSS custom properties properly defined in index.css
Mobile bottom navigation appears at viewport < 900px via @media query
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 61 verified Go-To-Market security fixes: 1) Cross-tenant isolation working (different tenants see different data), 2) Rate limiting working (5 per IP per 60s, 10 per email per hour), 3) Platform admin isolation working (sees no tenant data). Design system verified with CSS custom properties for border-radius (8px/12px). Mobile bottom navigation working with 5 tabs. Note: Rate limits are aggressive - wait 65+ seconds between test batches to reset IP limit. Email rate limit is 10 per hour - may need to wait longer or use different test emails. MOCKED: SolomonPay payment processing.

mocked_apis_list: SolomonPay payment processing - all payment_status is 'pending'

tests_passed: UI: Dashboard loads with greeting and stat cards
UI: People page loads with members table
UI: Groups page loads with 140 groups
UI: Services page loads with service plans
UI: Mobile bottom navigation visible at 375px
UI: Mobile navigation has 5 tabs (Home, People, Services, Groups, Giving)
